form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months held ground to the line 3rd of 8 at this track Bm62 on March 27 over 1500m, slow going 4 len behind Topmost carrying 60.5kg at $9.50. Previously second-up won by 1.5 len at Mornington Bm62 September 18 over 2000m defeating Makamae with 59.5kg at $6. Fitter and has strong claims.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 9th of 11 at Pakenham Bm62 on March 5 over 1600m, 10 len behind Nic's Choice with 59.5kg at $41. Second-up led but faded 3rd of 7 at Bairnsdale Bm62 on March 22 over 2200m, 4 len behind Quite The Lass with 59.5kg at $21. Hard to have in this company.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the straight.
Restrained at the start to obtain cover at the rear of the field.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. When well in the market at debut, 2nd of 10 at Warrnambool 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1400m, nose behind Till Queen carrying 58kg at $4.20. Second-up favourite; came home strongly from last on the turn and won by a long-neck at this track Mdn-Sw March 27 over 1600m on a rain affected track defeating Panda's Spectrum with 59kg at $1.60. Among the chances with further improvement.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently favourite; won by a neck at Sale Mdn-Sw March 29 over 1717m on a rain affected track defeating Angling Angel with 57kg at $1.85. Before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1400m, 0.8 len behind Cadillac Sam carrying 56kg at $4. Profiles well and can go right on with it.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 2nd of 11 at this track Bm62 on March 27 over 2025m, on a slow track; 1.3 len behind So Suave carrying 57.5kg at $3.60. Before that 4th in a small field at Caulfield Heath 0 - 66 on March 4 over 1800m, 2.5 len behind Mr Independent carrying 56.5kg at $3.40. Making headway. Going well and rates highly.
